title: Economic Indicators Calendar

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: The New York Fed publishes a calendar listing scheduled economic data releases for April 2026 including CPI, PPI, GDP, employment reports, ISM surveys, and various Fed research publications, all timed to Eastern Time. This is a navigation/listing page containing only future scheduled release dates and times; no actual data or analysis is provided.
key_points: Page is a listing of scheduled economic data releases for April 2026, not a data release itself
Key releases listed include: CPI (April 10), PPI (April 14), Advance Retail Sales (April 16), GDP 3rd Release (April 9), GDP 1st Release (April 30)
Employment data scheduled: ADP (April 1), Employment Situation (April 3), Initial Claims (multiple dates)
Fed research publications listed include: NY Fed Staff Nowcast (multiple dates), Survey of Consumer Expectations (April 7), Outlook-at-Risk (April 15), Reserve Demand Elasticity (April 16)
Corporate Bond Market Distress Index (CMDI) scheduled for April 29 release
Michigan Consumer Survey preliminary (April 10) and final (April 24) releases listed
Times are Eastern Time; dates and times noted as tentative and subject to immediate change
No actual data, analysis, or policy commentary contained on this page
why_it_matters: This calendar page has no standalone research value for RAG applications. It serves only as a scheduling reference. Market participants and researchers would need to return to this page repeatedly to check for updates or navigate to individual data release pages when data is actually published.
